message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: My task only touches ImageBlock in types.py (adding get_image_mimetype()). Please propose which files you own so we keep edits disjoint; if your feature also touches types.py let's split by method/section.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I'm adding a normalize_image_bytes helper + refactoring image_to_base64 in types.py. Only touching this one file.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both need types.py, ImageBlock class - can't split by file. Propose splitting by region instead: I will add a module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded, decoded_for_guessing) helper near the top of the file, and rewrite the body of the image_to_base64 model_validator to use it. Please add your get_image_mimetype() as a NEW separate method (not editing image_to_base64's body), and feel free to have it call normalize_image_bytes once I've added it. This keeps our edits to non-overlapping lines. OK?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both must touch types.py (same ImageBlock class), so full file-level disjointness isn't possible. Let's split by concern instead: I will ONLY add a new method get_image_mimetype() to ImageBlock and change the image_to_base64 validator to call it instead of inline filetype.guess() (i.e. replace lines ~78-80 mimetype-guessing block with a call to self.get_image_mimetype()). I will NOT touch base64-encoding/byte-normalization logic. Please keep your normalize_image_bytes helper focused on the image bytes handling (encoding/normalization) and avoid re-adding inline mimetype-guessing logic in image_to_base64 - just call self.get_image_mimetype() where you need the mimetype. If you already started editing image_to_base64, let me know which lines you're touching so I can rebase my small change around yours.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed. I will add get_image_mimetype() as a new standalone method on ImageBlock (lazy compute + cache into self.image_mimetype) without touching image_to_base64's body or adding any module-level helpers. You own the image_to_base64 rewrite and normalize_image_bytes helper. Feel free to call self.get_image_mimetype() from your new code once merged. Sending DONE when my edit is in.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (module-level normalize_image_bytes function + full body of image_to_base64 validator)
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (new standalone get_image_mimetype method, added elsewhere in ImageBlock, not wired into image_to_base64)
note: There's a real overlap since both changes touch image_to_base64's mimetype-guess line, so let's avoid both editing that method. My task explicitly requires image_to_base64 to be refactored to call normalize_image_bytes(self.image) -> (encoded, decoded_for_guessing), and use decoded_for_guessing for filetype.guess inline - I own that whole method body plus the new module-level helper. Please add get_image_mimetype() as an independent new method (e.g. a small public helper other code/callers can invoke), and don't modify image_to_base64 itself. This keeps us on fully disjoint lines. Sound OK?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (new standalone get_image_mimetype method on ImageBlock only)
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (module-level normalize_image_bytes + full image_to_base64 body)
note: Confirmed, sounds good. I will not touch image_to_base64 or add module-level helpers - just a new get_image_mimetype() method elsewhere in ImageBlock. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (module-level normalize_image_bytes helper + image_to_base64 body)
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (get_image_mimetype method)
note: Confirmed, proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Implemented and tested normalize_image_bytes() (module-level, above MessageRole) plus refactored image_to_base64() to use it. Did not touch anything else in the file. 12/12 existing tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py pass. Ready for you to add get_image_mimetype().

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Implementation complete: added ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() as a standalone method (after resolve_image, before ContentBlock). It returns cached self.image_mimetype if set, otherwise decodes self.image (base64) and guesses via filetype, caching the result. Did not touch image_to_base64 or add module-level helpers, as agreed. Existing tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py still pass (12 passed).
